requirement_topic.en: Horizontal Battery Regime — Labelling, EPR and Supply-Chain Due Diligence (Nepal status)
requirement_topic.zh: 横向电池制度——标签、EPR及供应链尽职调查（尼泊尔现状）
requirement_topic.zht: 橫向電池制度——標籤、EPR及供應鏈盡職調查（尼泊爾現狀）

summary.en: Nepal does not operate a single horizontal battery regulation equivalent to the EU Battery Regulation 2023/1542. There is no Nepalese battery passport, mandatory carbon-footprint declaration, recycled-content threshold, or critical-raw-material （cobalt, lithium, nickel, graphite） supply-chain due-diligence law for battery exporters or importers. Where lithium batteries and power banks are regulated, control is exercised through （1） NBSM （Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology） product standards and conformity where a Nepal Standard （NS） scheme covers the product category, （2） general consumer-protection and labelling expectations administered by the Department of Commerce, Supplies and Consumer Protection, and （3） import documentation handled by the in-country importer of record at customs. Producer-responsibility for battery waste is addressed, if at all, through general solid-waste and environment provisions rather than a dedicated EPR battery scheme.
summary.zh: 尼泊尔没有等同于欧盟电池法规2023/1542的单一横向电池法规。对于电池出口商或进口商，尼泊尔没有电池护照、强制碳足迹声明、再生材料含量门槛，亦无关键原材料（钴、锂、镍、石墨）供应链尽职调查法律。在锂电池及移动电源受监管之处，管控通过以下方式实施：（1）当某NS方案覆盖该产品类别时，由NBSM（尼泊尔标准与计量局）产品标准与符合性管控；（2）由商业、供应与消费者保护部管理的一般消费者保护与标签要求；（3）由本地进口商在海关处理进口文件。电池废弃物的生产者责任（如有）通过一般固体废物及环境条款处理，而非专门的EPR电池方案。
summary.zht: 尼泊爾沒有等同於歐盟電池法規2023/1542的單一橫向電池法規。對於電池出口商或進口商，尼泊爾沒有電池護照、強制碳足跡聲明、再生材料含量門檻，亦無關鍵原材料（鈷、鋰、鎳、石墨）供應鏈盡職調查法律。在鋰電池及行動電源受監管之處，管控通過以下方式實施：（1）當某NS方案覆蓋該產品類別時，由NBSM（尼泊爾標準與計量局）產品標準與符合性管控；（2）由商業、供應與消費者保護部管理的一般消費者保護與標籤要求；（3）由本地進口商在海關處理進口文件。電池廢棄物的生產者責任（如有）通過一般固體廢物及環境條款處理，而非專門的EPR電池方案。

standards_or_laws: Nepal Standards （Certification Mark） Act, 2037 （1980） and associated NBSM regulations — basis for NS standards and mandatory certification where scheduled
Consumer Protection Act, 2075 （2018）, Nepal — general labelling and consumer-information obligations
Solid Waste Management Act, 2068 （2011） and Environment Protection Act, 2076 （2019）, Nepal — general waste/environment provisions （no dedicated battery EPR）

summary.en: China does not have a single horizontal battery regulation either. Portable lithium battery packs and power banks for export are primarily subject to GB 31241 （safety）, customs import/export declaration, and mandatory CCC certification for certain rechargeable battery categories under the CNCA catalogue. China has no battery passport, no export-facing carbon-footprint declaration framework, and no cobalt/lithium supply-chain due-diligence law for exporters. China operates a domestic producer-responsibility framework for waste batteries under the Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law and related recycling measures, which is domestic in scope.
summary.zh: 中国同样没有单一横向电池法规。出口便携式锂电池组及移动电源主要受GB 31241（安全）、海关进出口申报约束，部分可充电电池类别还须依据CNCA目录取得强制性CCC认证。中国没有电池护照，没有面向出口的碳足迹声明框架，也没有针对出口商的钴/锂供应链尽职调查法律。中国在《固体废物污染环境防治法》及相关回收措施下实行废旧电池生产者责任的国内框架，其范围属国内要求。
summary.zht: 中國同樣沒有單一橫向電池法規。出口便攜式鋰電池組及行動電源主要受GB 31241（安全）、海關進出口申報約束，部分可充電電池類別還須依據CNCA目錄取得強制性CCC認證。中國沒有電池護照，沒有面向出口的碳足跡聲明框架，也沒有針對出口商的鈷/鋰供應鏈盡職調查法律。中國在《固體廢物污染環境防治法》及相關回收措施下實行廢舊電池生產者責任的國內框架，其範圍屬國內要求。

standards_or_laws: GB 31241 — Safety requirements for portable sealed secondary lithium cells and batteries for use in portable electronic equipment （SAC/SAMR）
PRC Solid Waste Pollution Prevention and Control Law （2020 revision） — domestic producer-responsibility framework
CCC （China Compulsory Certification, CNCA/SAMR） — mandatory for certain rechargeable battery categories sold domestically

gap.en: Unlike the EU, Nepal imposes no horizontal battery-passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or critical-mineral due-diligence obligations — so those EU-style structural gaps do not arise for the Nepal market. The practical Nepal-facing requirement is narrower: confirm whether the specific lithium battery / power bank category is scheduled under an NBSM mandatory NS scheme, meet general consumer-protection labelling （product identity, capacity, importer details, safety warnings in a language understood locally）, and route the goods through a registered in-country importer for customs clearance. Chinese GB 31241 / CCC documents support engineering review but are not, by themselves, an NBSM conformity grant where one is required.
gap.zh: 与欧盟不同，尼泊尔不施加横向的电池护照、碳足迹、再生含量或关键矿产尽职调查义务——因此对尼泊尔市场不产生欧盟式结构性差距。面向尼泊尔的实际要求更为有限：确认该特定锂电池/移动电源类别是否被列入NBSM强制NS方案、满足一般消费者保护标签要求（产品标识、容量、进口商信息、以当地可理解语言标注的安全警示），并通过已注册的本地进口商办理海关清关。中国GB 31241/CCC文件可支持工程审查，但其本身在需要NBSM符合性时不构成NBSM符合性授予。
gap.zht: 與歐盟不同，尼泊爾不施加橫向的電池護照、碳足跡、再生含量或關鍵礦產盡職調查義務——因此對尼泊爾市場不產生歐盟式結構性差距。面向尼泊爾的實際要求更為有限：確認該特定鋰電池/行動電源類別是否被列入NBSM強制NS方案、滿足一般消費者保護標籤要求（產品標識、容量、進口商信息、以當地可理解語言標註的安全警示），並通過已註冊的本地進口商辦理海關清關。中國GB 31241/CCC文件可支持工程審查，但其本身在需要NBSM符合性時不構成NBSM符合性授予。

mandatory_status.target: No horizontal battery regime — Nepal has no EU-style battery passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, or supply-chain due-diligence law; NBSM NS conformity applies only where the product category is scheduled under a mandatory NS scheme; general consumer-protection labelling applies
mandatory_status.cn: Not applicable in equivalent form — GB 31241 safety and customs declaration are domestic export requirements; CCC mandatory for scheduled rechargeable battery categories sold domestically; no battery passport, carbon-footprint, or critical-mineral due-diligence law applies to Chinese exporters

source.publisher: Nepal Bureau of Standards and Metrology （NBSM）

compliance_verdict.en: [INFORMATIONAL] Nepal does not operate a horizontal battery regulation, so the EU-style battery-passport, carbon-footprint, recycled-content, and supply-chain due-diligence gaps do not apply to the Nepal market. The Nepal-facing tasks are to verify NBSM NS scheme coverage for the specific category, satisfy general consumer-protection labelling, and clear customs through a registered in-country importer. Chinese GB 31241 or CCC certification does not substitute for an NBSM conformity grant where one is required.
compliance_verdict.zh: [仅供参考] 尼泊尔不实行横向电池法规，因此欧盟式的电池护照、碳足迹、再生含量及供应链尽职调查差距对尼泊尔市场不适用。面向尼泊尔的任务是：核实该特定类别是否受NBSM NS方案覆盖、满足一般消费者保护标签要求，并通过已注册的本地进口商完成海关清关。在需要NBSM符合性之处，中国GB 31241或CCC认证不能替代NBSM符合性授予。
compliance_verdict.zht: [僅供參考] 尼泊爾不實行橫向電池法規，因此歐盟式的電池護照、碳足跡、再生含量及供應鏈盡職調查差距對尼泊爾市場不適用。面向尼泊爾的任務是：核實該特定類別是否受NBSM NS方案覆蓋、滿足一般消費者保護標籤要求，並通過已註冊的本地進口商完成海關清關。在需要NBSM符合性之處，中國GB 31241或CCC認證不能替代NBSM符合性授予。
